stemHtml: Similar climatic conditions can be found in many regions across the Earth. An example of a geographical area with an equatorial climate is (1) _____ and an example of an area with a temperate climate is (2) _____.

options.a: (1) the Kalahari Desert in Southern Africa; (2) central Siberia
options.b: (1) the Congo delta in Africa; (2) the Kalahari desert in Southern Africa
options.c: (1) the Brazilian rainforest; (2) the South Island of New Zealand
options.d: (1) Mali in the Sahara Desert; (2) the Northern Territories of Australia
